scenario: Valid scenario: exercises the opposite branch of every conditional gate. Filed by an attorney with an explicit power of attorney (applicantIsAttorney) rather than the trader personally; the attorney is a foreign national with neither an EGN nor an LNCh, so applicantBirthPlace/applicantPermanentAddress are populated instead of applicantEgnOrLnch; the applicant does not consent to electronic delivery, so refusalDeliveryAddresseeName/refusalDeliveryPostalAddress are populated and refusalDeliveryEmail is omitted; the sole trader elects voluntary VAT registration under Art. 100(1); a regulated activity (driving-instruction services) requiring a professional-qualification certificate and a permit.
